web_text: Jude, a servant of Jesus Christ, and brother of James, to those who are called, sanctified by God the Father, and kept for Jesus Christ: Mercy to you and peace and love be multiplied. Beloved, while I was very eager to write to you about our common salvation, I was constrained to write to you exhorting you to contend earnestly for the faith which was once for all delivered to the saints. For there are certain men who crept in secretly, even those who were long ago written about for this condemnation: ungodly men, turning the grace of our God into indecency, and denying our only Master, God, and Lord, Jesus Christ.
slang_text: Yo, it's Jude here, just a dude who serves Jesus Christ, and James's brother -- writing to all you who got called out, made righteous by God the Father, and kept safe for Jesus Christ. Mercy, peace, and love, stacked up totally huge on you. Okay, my dudes, I was stoked to write you a righteous letter about the salvation we all share, but instead I gotta lay some heavy stuff on you: fight hard for the faith that got handed down to God's people once and for all, no do-overs. See, some grody dudes snuck in the back door when nobody was looking -- total wastoids the Scriptures called out way ahead of time for exactly this kind of smackdown. Ungodly types, twisting our God's grace into some bogus excuse to do whatever they want, and straight-up denying our one and only Master, God, and Lord, Jesus Christ. What's their damage?

web_text: Now I desire to remind you, though you already know this, that the Lord, having saved a people out of the land of Egypt, afterward destroyed those who didn’t believe. Angels who didn’t keep their first domain, but deserted their own dwelling place, he has kept in everlasting bonds under darkness for the judgment of the great day. Even as Sodom and Gomorrah, and the cities around them, having, in the same way as these, given themselves over to sexual immorality and gone after strange flesh, are shown as an example, suffering the punishment of eternal fire. Yet in the same way, these also in their dreaming defile the flesh, despise authority, and slander celestial beings.
slang_text: Now I wanna jog your memory on some stuff you already got a clue about: the Lord hauled a whole nation outta Egypt, totally rescued 'em, and then bounced right around and wiped out the ones who wouldn't believe. And check this -- angels who bailed on their own turf, who ditched the spot they were supposed to hold down, he's got 'em locked up in chains in the dark forever, waiting on judgment day. And Sodom and Gomorrah and the towns around 'em, same deal, they went totally hog-wild with sexual immorality and chased after grody stuff nobody should chase, and now they're stuck as the ultimate example, roasting in eternal fire. Way harsh. But these dipsticks, dreaming up their own trip, still go right ahead and mess up their own bodies, dis authority like it's nothing, and talk smack about heavenly beings they don't even understand.

web_text: But Michael, the archangel, when contending with the devil and arguing about the body of Moses, dared not bring against him an abusive condemnation, but said, “May the Lord rebuke you!” But these speak evil of whatever things they don’t know. They are destroyed in these things that they understand naturally, like the creatures without reason. Woe to them! For they went in the way of Cain, and ran riotously in the error of Balaam for hire, and perished in Korah’s rebellion. These are hidden rocky reefs in your love feasts when they feast with you, shepherds who without fear feed themselves; clouds without water, carried along by winds; autumn trees without fruit, twice dead, plucked up by the roots;
slang_text: But get this -- even Michael the archangel, going toe-to-toe with the devil, arguing over Moses's body, didn't even dare throw down some nasty insult at him. He just said, "May the Lord straighten you out!" But these clowns talk trash about stuff they don't even understand, no clue whatsoever. Whatever they do get, they only get it like dumb animals get stuff -- pure instinct -- and that's exactly what wrecks 'em. Bogus, majorly bogus, what's coming their way! They followed Cain's playbook, dove headfirst into Balaam's screwup chasing a paycheck, and got wiped out in Korah's little rebellion, just like that. These spazoids are like hidden reefs wrecking your fellowship potlucks, straight-up feeding their own faces without a shred of shame while they're supposed to be shepherding you. They're like clouds that never drop a single bit of rain, just getting blown around by the wind, going nowhere. Fall trees with zero fruit, dead twice over, ripped clean out by the roots.

web_text: wild waves of the sea, foaming out their own shame; wandering stars, for whom the blackness of darkness has been reserved forever. About these also Enoch, the seventh from Adam, prophesied, saying, “Behold, the Lord came with ten thousands of his holy ones, to execute judgment on all, and to convict all the ungodly of all their works of ungodliness which they have done in an ungodly way, and of all the hard things which ungodly sinners have spoken against him.” These are murmurers and complainers, walking after their lusts (and their mouth speaks proud things), showing respect of persons to gain advantage.
slang_text: Wild ocean waves frothing up their own grody shame, wandering stars with nowhere to shine, stuck getting the blackest darkness reserved for 'em forever, no way out. Enoch, the seventh dude counting down from Adam, called all this out way back when, saying, "Check it -- the Lord's coming with like ten thousand of his holy ones, to lay down judgment on everybody, and to bust every ungodly person for every ungodly thing they've ever pulled, plus every harsh word these ungodly sinners talked against him." These wastoids are total complainers and grumblers, chasing whatever their lusts tell 'em to (and their mouths are always spouting some proud, puffed-up junk), sucking up to whoever can do 'em a favor. Talk about bogus.

web_text: But you, beloved, remember the words which have been spoken before by the apostles of our Lord Jesus Christ. They said to you that “In the last time there will be mockers, walking after their own ungodly lusts.” These are they who cause divisions, and are sensual, not having the Spirit. But you, beloved, keep building up yourselves on your most holy faith, praying in the Holy Spirit.
slang_text: But you guys, my dudes, remember what our Lord Jesus Christ's apostles told you way back. They said, "In the last days there's gonna be a bunch of mockers running around, chasing their own ungodly cravings like it's the only thing that matters." These are the dipsticks who split everybody up into cliques, all about their own senses, not even packing the Spirit. But you, my dudes, keep building yourselves up on the most righteous faith you've got, praying with the Holy Spirit backing you the whole way.

web_text: Keep yourselves in God’s love, looking for the mercy of our Lord Jesus Christ to eternal life. On some have compassion, making a distinction, and some save, snatching them out of the fire with fear, hating even the clothing stained by the flesh. Now to him who is able to keep them from stumbling, and to present you faultless before the presence of his glory in great joy,
slang_text: Stay put in God's love, dudes, keeping your eyes peeled for our Lord Jesus Christ's mercy leading you to life that never ends. Some folks, show 'em compassion, no doubt -- but be smart about it. Others, you gotta save by yanking 'em straight outta the fire, careful the whole time, hating even the stuff their sin's rubbed off on, like it's contaminated. Now, to the One who can keep you from wiping out and can stand you up totally faultless in front of his glory, throwing the most epic party imaginable --

web_text: to God our Savior, who alone is wise, be glory and majesty, dominion and power, both now and forever. Amen.
slang_text: -- to God our Savior, the one and only wise God, all the glory and majesty, all the power and dominion be his, now and forever, no cutoff date. Amen, fer sure.
